shared_properties: The modal uses a centered wide format that can present an icon, event text, and two to three response buttons.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #111111, background #000000, and accent #FFFFFF.
Button wells and icon space are arranged for mouse readability during urgent decision points.
differences: The popup emphasizes event urgency with a bright icon plaque and darker choice-button strip.
A header band provides space for raid, disease, prophecy, or storm titles supported by the crisis icon atlas.
The lower controls use thick borders and deep shadows so response options remain obvious in grayscale.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Centered event modal with runtime text and icon layers, shown when crises interrupt the winter cycle.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/art_000018.png during UI boot and compose it with icon and text children when an event state opens.
runtime_notes: Keep the icon plaque large enough for atlas icons from art_000008 to remain readable at 1x scale.
Expose button anchor rectangles so response options can be generated dynamically for different event types.
Place the modal above world layers and weather effects while preserving the top HUD for context.

context.usage: Centered modal used for raids, disease outbreaks, prophecies, and deep-storm tradeoff choices.

shape.silhouette: Wide centered modal with icon plaque, title band, body text zone, and heavy choice-button strip.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 720x260px with a readable icon plaque and at least two choice-button wells.
Title band, body zone, and choice strip are visually separated by strong borders or tonal shifts.
Choice-button wells remain readable without color labels and leave enough space for short action text.
